BUG FOUND & FIXED (session 2): All solitairestack.com game variant pages (pyramid, golf, tripeaks, etc.) had doubled JSON-LD schemas in the rendered DOM — raw HTML had 6 schemas, DOM showed 12. Fix: added stable id= attribute to every ld+json script tag across 22 files. JsonLd.tsx auto-generates id from @type+name slug.
